title: Caldera - System Network Connections Discovery (Windows)
description: Detects enumeration of active network connections on Windows systems. Caldera T1049 emulation runs netstat.exe and PowerShell Get-NetTCPConnection to list established connections, listening ports, and routing tables for network topology mapping after initial access.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and (('Process Name' like '*\\netstat.exe' and ('Command Line' like '*-an*' or 'Command Line' like '*-ano*' or 'Command Line' like '*-b*' or 'Command Line' like '*-f*')) or (('Command Line' like '*Get-NetTCPConnection*' or 'Command Line' like '*Get-NetUDPEndpoint*' or 'Command Line' like '*netstat -a*')) or ('Process Name' like '*\\route.exe' and 'Command Line' like '*print*'))
